description: Languages F-10 (Second Language pathway) capability progression map. Two strands: Communicating and Understanding. Sub-strand headings are generic across all ACARA Languages — 'the target language' can be interpreted for any selected language.
subject: Languages

_notes.generic_structure: Sub-strand headings and progression logic are identical across all ACARA Languages F-10 pathways. Only codes and language-specific content differ.
_notes.placeholder_note: Labels use 'the target language' so the file can be reused across languages. Keep ACARA codes unchanged unless your renderer explicitly supports code substitution.
_notes.foundation: Foundation has 3 undifferentiated codes before the sub-strand structure begins at Y1-2.

standards.title: Recognise and communicate meaning
standards.description: with support, recognise and communicate meaning in the target language
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise and communicate meaning in the target language with support.

standards.title: Explore language features
standards.description: explore, with support, language features of the target language noticing similarities and differences between the target language and English
standards.capability_goal: Students explore language features of the target language, noticing similarities and differences with English.

standards.title: Explore language and culture connections
standards.description: explore connections between language and culture
standards.capability_goal: Students explore connections between language and culture.

standards.title: Recognise and respond to classroom language
standards.description: recognise and respond to modelled classroom-related greetings, instructions and routines, and personal introductions
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise and respond to modelled classroom greetings, instructions, routines and personal introductions.

standards.title: Participate in guided language activities
standards.description: participate in a range of guided, play-based language activities using formulaic expressions, visual and spoken cues
standards.capability_goal: Students participate in guided, play-based language activities using formulaic expressions and visual cues.

standards.title: Locate key information in familiar texts
standards.description: locate, with support, key information in familiar texts, and respond using gestures, images, words and formulaic phrases
standards.capability_goal: Students locate key information in familiar texts and respond using gestures, images and formulaic phrases.

standards.title: Language carries cultural meaning
standards.description: notice that language carries cultural meaning in classroom-related greetings, introductions, instructions and routines
standards.capability_goal: Students notice that language carries cultural meaning in classroom greetings, introductions and routines.

standards.title: Create texts using familiar language
standards.description: use words, familiar phrases and modelled language to create spoken, written and multimodal texts
standards.capability_goal: Students use words, familiar phrases and modelled language to create spoken, written and multimodal texts.

standards.title: Sounds and rhythms of the target language
standards.description: recognise and imitate the sounds and rhythms of the target language
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise and imitate the sounds and rhythms of the target language.

standards.title: Roman alphabet and language features
standards.description: recognise that the Roman alphabet and features of language are used to construct meaning in the target language
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise how the Roman alphabet and language features construct meaning in the target language.

standards.title: Target language and English similarities
standards.description: notice that the target language has features that may be similar to or different from English
standards.capability_goal: Students notice similarities and differences between the target language and English language features.

standards.title: Language reflects cultural practices
standards.description: notice that people use language in ways that reflect cultural practices
standards.capability_goal: Students notice that people use language in ways that reflect cultural practices.

standards.title: Initiate and respond to questions
standards.description: initiate exchanges and respond to modelled questions about self, others, and classroom environment, using formulaic expressions
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate exchanges and respond to modelled questions about self, others and classroom using formulaic expressions.

standards.title: Plan with others using familiar phrases
standards.description: participate in activities that involve planning with others, using a range of familiar phrases and modelled structures
standards.capability_goal: Students participate in activities involving planning with others using familiar phrases and modelled structures.

standards.title: Locate and respond to key information
standards.description: locate and respond to key information related to familiar content obtained from spoken, written and multimodal texts
standards.capability_goal: Students locate and respond to key information in spoken, written and multimodal texts on familiar content.

standards.title: Comprehend and convey cultural meaning
standards.description: develop strategies to comprehend and adjust the target language in familiar contexts to convey cultural meaning
standards.capability_goal: Students develop strategies to comprehend and adjust language in familiar contexts to convey cultural meaning.

standards.title: Create informative and imaginative texts
standards.description: create and present informative and imaginative spoken, written and multimodal texts using formulaic expressions, simple phrases and sentences and modelled textual conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students create and present informative and imaginative texts using formulaic expressions and modelled conventions.

standards.title: Sounds, pronunciation and intonation
standards.description: recognise and use modelled combinations of sounds, pronunciation and intonation patterns of the target language to form words and phrases
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise and use modelled sounds, pronunciation and intonation patterns to form words and phrases.

standards.title: Grammar and syntax in familiar texts
standards.description: recognise target language conventions, grammatical structures and basic syntax in familiar texts and contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise target language conventions, grammatical structures and basic syntax in familiar texts.

standards.title: Compare target language and English features
standards.description: recognise familiar target language features and compare with those of English, in known contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise familiar target language features and compare them with English in known contexts.

standards.title: Language and cultural practices
standards.description: identify connections between target language and cultural practices
standards.capability_goal: Students identify connections between target language and cultural practices.

standards.title: Initiate and sustain exchanges
standards.description: initiate and sustain modelled exchanges in familiar contexts related to students' personal worlds and school environment
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate and sustain modelled exchanges in familiar contexts related to personal worlds and school.

standards.title: Plan and negotiate with others
standards.description: participate in activities that involve planning and negotiating with others, using language that expresses information, preferences and ideas
standards.capability_goal: Students participate in activities involving planning and negotiating using language expressing information and ideas.

standards.title: Process and respond to information
standards.description: locate and process information and ideas in a range of spoken, written and multimodal texts, and respond in different ways to suit purpose
standards.capability_goal: Students locate and process information in a range of texts and respond in ways suited to purpose.

standards.title: Interpret and convey cultural meaning
standards.description: apply strategies to interpret and convey meaning in the target language in familiar non-verbal, spoken and written cultural contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply strategies to interpret and convey meaning in familiar cultural contexts.

standards.title: Create varied texts with modelled structures
standards.description: create and present a range of informative and imaginative spoken, written and multimodal texts using a variety of modelled sentence structures to sequence information and ideas, and conventions appropriate to text type
standards.capability_goal: Students create a range of texts using modelled sentence structures to sequence ideas with appropriate conventions.

standards.title: Fluency and rhythm in spoken target language
standards.description: apply knowledge of combinations of sounds, syllables, pronunciation and intonation patterns to develop fluency and rhythm to known words and phrases
standards.capability_goal: Students apply phonological knowledge to develop fluency and rhythm in known words and phrases.

standards.title: Grammar to compose and respond
standards.description: use knowledge of modelled grammatical structures and formulaic expressions to compose and respond to texts, using appropriate punctuation and textual conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students use grammatical structures and formulaic expressions to compose and respond to texts.

standards.title: Compare structures using metalanguage
standards.description: compare some target language structures and features with those of English, using some familiar metalanguage
standards.capability_goal: Students compare target language and English language structures using familiar metalanguage.

standards.title: Language reflects culture and identity
standards.description: recognise that language reflects cultural practices, values and identity, and that this impacts on non-verbal and spoken communication
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise that language reflects cultural practices, values and identity and impacts communication.

standards.title: Sustain exchanges in varied contexts
standards.description: initiate and sustain exchanges in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts related to students' experiences, feelings and views, adjusting their language in response to others
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate and sustain exchanges in familiar and unfamiliar contexts, adjusting language in response to others.

standards.title: Negotiate and problem-solve collaboratively
standards.description: collaborate in activities that involve the language of transaction, negotiation and problem-solving to plan projects and events
standards.capability_goal: Students collaborate using transaction, negotiation and problem-solving language to plan projects and events.

standards.title: Interpret and respond to diverse texts
standards.description: interpret information, ideas and opinions in a range of spoken, written and multimodal texts, and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and opinions in diverse texts and respond appropriately to cultural context.

standards.title: Interpret and adjust for cultural context
standards.description: interpret and adjust non-verbal, spoken and written language to convey meaning in the target language in familiar and some unfamiliar cultural contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and adjust language to convey meaning in familiar and unfamiliar cultural contexts.

standards.title: Create texts for specific purposes
standards.description: create and present spoken, written and multimodal, informative and imaginative texts for specific purposes, selecting vocabulary, expressions, grammatical structures, features and conventions appropriate to text type and context
standards.capability_goal: Students create texts for specific purposes selecting vocabulary, structures and conventions appropriate to text type.

standards.title: Spoken conventions for fluency
standards.description: apply knowledge of conventions of spoken the target language to enhance fluency, and to respond to and create texts in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply spoken conventions to enhance fluency in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts.

standards.title: Grammar to compose and respond
standards.description: apply understanding of grammatical structures and expressions to compose and respond to texts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply grammatical structures and expressions to compose and respond to texts.

standards.title: Reflect on language differences
standards.description: reflect on similarities and differences between the target language and English language structures and features, using metalanguage
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on similarities and differences between the target language and English using metalanguage.

standards.title: Identity shaped by language and culture
standards.description: reflect on and explain how identity is shaped by language(s), culture(s), attitudes, beliefs and values
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and explain how identity is shaped by languages, cultures, attitudes and values.

standards.title: Extend exchanges in varied contexts
standards.description: initiate, sustain and extend exchanges in familiar and unfamiliar contexts related to students' own and others' experiences of the world, adjusting their language in response to others
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate, sustain and extend exchanges in familiar and unfamiliar contexts, adjusting language to others.

standards.title: Negotiate diverse views
standards.description: contribute to discussions that involve diverse views to negotiate outcomes, address issues and compare experiences
standards.capability_goal: Students contribute to discussions involving diverse views to negotiate outcomes and compare experiences.

standards.title: Evaluate and synthesise across texts
standards.description: evaluate and synthesise information, ideas and perspectives in a broad range of spoken, written and multimodal texts and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate and synthesise information across a broad range of texts, responding to cultural context and audience.

standards.title: Interpret and translate for intercultural understanding
standards.description: interpret and translate non-verbal, spoken and written interactions and texts to convey meaning and intercultural understanding in familiar and unfamiliar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and translate interactions and texts to convey meaning and intercultural understanding.

standards.title: Create texts for diverse audiences
standards.description: create and present informative and imaginative texts for diverse contexts and purposes, selecting vocabulary, expressions, grammatical structures and a range of features and conventions to engage different audiences
standards.capability_goal: Students create texts for diverse purposes selecting vocabulary, structures and conventions to engage different audiences.

standards.title: Spoken features for fluency
standards.description: apply features and conventions of spoken the target language to extend fluency in responding to and creating texts in familiar and unfamiliar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply spoken features to extend fluency in responding to and creating texts in varied contexts.

standards.title: Grammar to predict and compose
standards.description: apply knowledge of grammatical structures to predict meaning and compose texts that contain some complex structures and ideas
standards.capability_goal: Students apply grammatical knowledge to predict meaning and compose texts with complex structures and ideas.

standards.title: Evaluate texts using metalanguage
standards.description: reflect on and evaluate the target language texts, using metalanguage to analyse language structures and features
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and evaluate target language texts using metalanguage to analyse structures and features.

standards.title: Evaluate identity and communication
standards.description: reflect on and evaluate how identity is shaped by language(s), culture(s), attitudes, beliefs and values, and how these affect ways of communicating
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate how identity is shaped by languages and cultures and how these affect ways of communicating.

capability_threads.description: Languages F-10 capability sequences. Sub-strand structure is generic across all ACARA Languages pathways.

communicating.label: Communicating meaning in the target language

mediating.label: Mediating meaning in and between languages

creating.label: Creating text in the target language

understanding_culture.label: Understanding the interrelationship of language and culture
